prompt: Digital art of a cyberpunk warrior representing Terminal CLI, fighting game character portrait style. The character is an imposing figure made of glowing green terminal text cascading like The Matrix. Their body is formed from command-line code (ls, grep, vim commands visible). Face is a dark visor with a single glowing orange cursor blinking. Wearing a hooded cloak made of flowing ASCII characters and binary. One arm raised in fighting stance, fingers forming keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+C gesture). Background: Pure black with faint green scan lines. Lighting: Strong orange rim light on left side, green glow emanating from the character. Style: Stylized digital art, semi-realistic with cel-shading edges. NOT pixel art. Pose: Three-quarter view facing right, aggressive fighting stance, ready to strike. Mood: Powerful, mysterious, ancient-tech-meets-future. Color palette: Dominant black, green (#7ee787) text/glow, orange (#f0883e) accents.
